name: Shanghai Putailai New Energy Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Shanghai Putailai New Energy Technology Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, develops and sells materials of lithium-ion batteries and automated process equipment in China. It offers lithium-ion battery anode materials, coating separators, automated coating equipment, coated diaphragms, aluminum-plastic packaging films, and micro nano powders. The company was founded in 2012 and is based in Shanghai, China.
